title: Line 31260 – Canada employment amount, for someone who died - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 31260 – Canada employment amount, for someone who died
- Return type: Personal income tax and benefit return
Employees are eligible to claim whichever of the following amounts is less :
- the total of the employment income entered on line 10100 and line 10400 of the deceased's final return

## Forms and publications
- Federal income tax and benefit information
